## Domain

<!-- What research field is this configuration for? -->

## Team design

<!-- Briefly describe each agent role and why you chose this team structure. -->

## What makes this configuration notable?

<!-- What reviewer constraints, search triggers, or KB seeding strategy did you develop? What did you learn about making the swarm effective for this domain? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have a `swarm_config.yml` for this domain
- [ ] I have `persona.md` files for each agent
- [ ] I have a `README.md` describing the team and how to use it
- [ ] No real API keys or sensitive data included
- [ ] I am willing to open a pull request with these files under `examples/`
